info.title: Packing Service
info.description:
Packing Service

 **Last update**: 22 dic 25, 09:37 a. m.

tags.name: Package
tags.description: Containers where products are placed during your store operation from picking to delivery

tags.name: Package Type
tags.description: Package types allow you to generate consistent packages based on predefined properties

post.description: Generate a PDF document of the Package Labels

pdfLink.description: The generated PDF file download link

post.summary: Create or update massive order packages
post.description: Create or update massive prder packages

requestBody.description: The package to create or update.

post.summary: Update or remove massive order packages
post.description: Update or remove massive order packages

This API creates new packages and uses (updates) existing packages as follows:

Only in cases where the package to be created is a returnable package type and there is a returnable package that has the status `free` or `inUse`, will it be updated by adding one more use.

Otherwise a new package will be created.

get.summary: Get one Package Type by ID
Get a list of Package Types

id.name: id
id.description: The unique identifier of the item

ean.description:
The partial or complete barcode of the package. If `dateCreatedRange` is not passed, it will use 15 days range.

We recommend using `strictEan` whenever possible as it is more accurate.

strictEan.description:
The barcode of the package.

This property is for searching by full EAN.

dateCreatedRange.description: A range of dates where the packages were created

dateModifiedRange.description: A range of dates where the packages were modified

PackageTypeFilters.name: filters
PackageTypeFilters.description: The field to apply the filter

FunctionsFilters.name: filters
FunctionsFilters.description: The filters to apply to the model

schema.description: The filters to apply to the model

FunctionsCalculateTotals.name: calculateTotals
FunctionsCalculateTotals.description: Indicates if the response must return the totals data applied filters. **Default** `false`

FunctionsAllItems.name: allItems
FunctionsAllItems.description: Indicates if the response must return all items. **Default** `false`

x-janis-total.description: The total amount of records in the list

x-janis-total-created.description: The total amount of records created

x-janis-total-updated.description: The total amount of records updated

x-janis-total-not-modified.description: The total amount of records not modified

x-janis-total-error.description: The total amount of records that were invalid

x-janis-total-removed.description: The total amount of records removed

itemsNotModified.description: Items that did not need to be modified.

errorMessage.description: Failure message showing an error description
errorMessage.example: Returnable package types require an EAN

id.description: The unique identifier of the item

dateModified.description: The date of the last modification

userCreated.description: The ID of the user who created the item

userModified.description: The ID of the user who last modified the item

price.description: Package's price. If not send, it will be tried to be calculated based on the `items` and `packages` that it contains.

items.description: List of items inside the package

packages.description: A list of packages inside this package

OrderPackagesBatchResponseCorrectItem.description: An item from the order packages batch response.

OrderPackagesReleaseResponseItem.description: An item from the order packages release batch response.

allOf.description: Package dimensions. These are inherited from the Package Type if not sent.

volume.description: Relation of the width height and length in cubic centimeters

productGroupIds.description: A list of packages inside this package

warehouseId.description:
This refers to the `id` in the **Warehouse** Entity. See [Warehouse](/v2/service/wms#tag/Warehouse).

It is required in location.

orderId.description: This refers to the `id` of the **Order**. See [Order](/v2/service/oms#tag/Orders)

packageTypeId.description:
The ID of a [Package Type](#operation/getPackageType).

If you use the package `ean` to match against the Package Type `identifier`, don't send this field.
Otherwise, this field is **required**.

ean.description:
The barcode of the package. This will be used to match a Package Type if `packageTypeId` is not sent.

Otherwise, this field is **required** if the `packageTypeId` is not passed or the package type is returnable. See [Package Type](#tag/Package-Type)

description.description: A description of the content of the package

material.description: Package's material. This is inherited from the Package Type.

currency.description: Package's price currency ISO3 Code (this is inherited from it's items currency)

price.description: Package's price. If not send, it will be tried to be calculated based on the `items` and `packages` that it contains.

packages.description: A list of packages inside this package

returnable.description: If package should return to the store/warehouse. This is inherited from the Package Type.

acquisitionCost.description: Cost of acquisition of the package itself. This is inherited from the Package Type.

items.description: List of items inside the package

identifier.description:
The package type's identifier. This works in combination with `identifierType`.

Leave this empty if the package type does not have a barcode or it doesn't have a pattern

identifierType.description:
The identifier type sets how packages EANs will be compared with the identifier in order to detect the correct package type.

Leave this empty if the package type does not have a barcode or it doesn't have a pattern

isDefault.description:
Whether this package type is or not the default when no package types are matched

`Warning` **PackageType** entity must have only one default. Set this property as true will override any other existent **PackageType** *isDefault* as **false**

width.description: Width of the package in centimeters

height.description: Height of the package in centimeters

length.description: Length of the package in centimeters

volume.description: Relation of height, width and length in cubic centimeters

weightEmpty.description: Weight of the package when it's empty

maxWeight.description: Max weight in the package in grams

returnable.description: If the package have to be returned to the store

requirePosition.description: Indicates if the package requires a position

maxUsageQuantity.description: Maximum quantity of times that the package can be used. Only available when `returnable` is `true`.

acquisitionCost.description: Cost of acquisition of each package of this type

incompatibleCategories.description: The IDs of the categories which are incompatible with the package type. This refer to the `id` of the **Category** Entity. See [Category](/v2/service/catalog#tag/Category).

sellingPrice.description: The selling price of the package type that will be charged to the customer

FunctionTotals.description: The totals data. It is only available when `calculateTotals` parameter is active

total.description: The total items found in database applied filters

pages.description: The total pages for the filters applied
